title: Panjab University Chandigarh Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Panjab University Chandigarh Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Panjab University Chandigarh Result 2026 Out for 1st Semester B.Com LLB (Hons) 5 Year Integrated Course, B.Com (FYUP) and LLM 2 Year Course (UILS) December 2025 exams on the official website - results.puexam.in on 08-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Panjab University result.

content.text: Panjab University, Chandigarh has officially released the Panjab University Result 2026 for various 1st semester UG and PG examinations conducted in December 2025. The latest update covers B.Com. LL.B. (Hons) 5 Year Integrated Course (Under CBCS) 1st Semester, Bachelor of Commerce (FYUP) 1st Semester and Master of Laws (LLM 2 Year Course at UILS) 1st Semester examinations, whose results have been published on May 08, 2026.

Panjab University Chandigarh Result 2026 has been released online on the official result website - results.puexam.in. Students who appeared in the December 2025 exam session can now check and download their PU exam results using their roll number and course or semester details on the result portal.

To access the result, candidates need to visit the Panjab University exam result portal, open the respective course link and enter the required login details to view their marks and overall status. After downloading the provisional marksheet, students are advised to verify their personal details, subject-wise scores and result status carefully, and contact the university or departmental examination branch in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: Panjab University Chandigarh Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Panjab University has published the latest Panjab University Chandigarh Results 2026 for December 2025 examinations covering key UG and PG law and commerce courses. The newly declared results include B.Com. LL.B. (Hons) 5 Year Integrated Course (Under CBCS) 1st Semester, Bachelor of Commerce (FYUP) 1st Semester and LLM (2 Year Course at UILS) 1st Semester. Students can log in to the official PU exam result portal results.puexam.in and download their provisional result for academic reference and further admission or progression formalities.

rows: B.Com. LL.B. (Hons) 5 Year Integrated Course (CBCS), Bachelor of Commerce (FYUP), Master of Laws (LLM 2 Year Course at UILS)

sections.heading: Panjab University Chandigarh Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Panjab University has activated direct links on the official PU exam result portal for students to check their latest December 2025 1st semester results online. Using these active result links, students of B.Com. LL.B. (Hons) 5 Year Integrated Course, B.Com (FYUP) and LLM (2 Year Course at UILS) can instantly view or download their Panjab University Chandigarh Result 2026. Candidates simply need to open the result home page, select the respective course result link and enter their roll number to access the provisional marksheet.

links.label: B.Com. LL.B. (Hons) 5 Year Integrated Course (Under CBCS) 1st Semester Examination Result 2026 - December 2025
Bachelor of Commerce (FYUP) 1st Semester Examination Result 2026 - December 2025
Master of Laws (LLM 2 Year Course at UILS) 1st Semester Examination Result 2026 - December 2025

sections.heading: How to Download Panjab University Chandigarh Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check and download Panjab University Chandigarh Result 2026 for B.Com LLB, B.Com (FYUP) and LLM 1st Semester exams:

items: Visit the official Panjab University exam result website at https://results.puexam.in/.

On the home page, click on the relevant link for "B.Com. LL.B. (Hons) 5 Year Integrated Course 1st Semester", "Bachelor of Commerce (FYUP) 1st Semester" or "Master of Laws (LLM 2 Year Course at UILS) 1st Semester" December 2025 result.
The course specific result page will open in a new window.
Enter your Roll Number and any other details asked on the result page correctly.
Click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button.
Your Panjab University Chandigarh Result 2026 for the selected course and semester will be displayed on the screen.
Download the provisional marksheet and take a printout for future reference, counselling or document verification.
